_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION: The AProgressCircle component displays progress as a circular indicator. It supports standard and indeterminate states and is useful when you want to visualize completion within a compact area.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_GROUP_INDETERMINATE_D: The AProgressCircle component allows you to display an indeterminate circular progress indicator with animation. By using the indeterminate prop, you can indicate that an activity is ongoing without showing a specific completion value.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_DURATION_: Controls the animation duration of the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_INDETERMINATE_: Enables the indeterminate mode of the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_MAX_: Upper bound, maximum value for the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_MIN_: Lower bound, minimum value for the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_ROTATE_: Rotates the circular progress indicator by the specified number of degrees.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_SHOW_VALUE_: Specifies whether the progress value should be displayed inside the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_STROKE_WIDTH_: Sets the stroke width of the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_VALUE_: The current progress value of the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_VALUE_TEXT_CLAS: One or more classes for customizing the displayed progress value text.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_VALUE_TEXT_INTE: Specifies how to format the displayed progress value. If enabled, the value is shown as an integer percentage.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_PROPS_WIDTH_: Sets the width and height of the circular progress indicator.
_A_PROGRESS_CIRCLE_SLOT_PROGRESS_TEXT_: Allows customizing the displayed progress value. The slot scope provides the valuePercent value.
